# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [v0.7.2] - 2026-03-02

### 🚀 Features

- *(pass)* Replace GPG pass keys with custom .key encryption

### 💼 Other

- Revert "feat(pass): Replace GPG pass keys with custom .key encryption"

### ⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

- Updated screenshot

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [v0.7.1] - 2026-02-24

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- *(logging)* Implement private directory and file permissions for debug and SSH logs
- *(auth)* Stop exposing SSH passwords via SSHPASS env by using sshpass -d FD transport
- *(security)* Harden command execution, secret handling, and terminal safety

### ⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

- Release v0.7.0 ([#58](https://github.com/karsyboy/color-ssh/pull/58))
- Remove SSH passphrase handling scripts

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [v0.7.0] - 2026-02-24

### 🚀 Features

- *(auth)* Implement password auto-login feature using #_pass key in SSH config
- *(pass)* Add interactive pass key creation and CLI support
- Implement #_pass prompt feature with TUI integration
- *(auth)* Enhance GPG passphrase handling and add context-aware skip resolution

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- *(docs)* Remove outdated sshpass auto-login instructions from README
- *(docs)* Update README to clarify SSH auto-login requirements and remove outdated pass key creation instructions

### 🚜 Refactor

- *(pass)* Streamline pass key handling and remove unused states

### ⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

- Bump version to 0.7.0 in Cargo.toml

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [v0.6.6] - 2026-02-23

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- *(tui)* Undo commit a83316c as it had unexpected behavior to nano and other terminal apps.
- *(tui)* Improve mouse selection behavior and clipboard handling

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [v0.6.5] - 2026-02-23

### 🚜 Refactor

- Simplify color style handling in terminal tab rendering

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [v0.6.4] - 2026-02-23

### 🚀 Features

- *(highlighter)* Introduce ANSI color state management for chunk processing

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- *(tui)* Update mouse selection behavior to include Shift modifier and improve key event encoding

### 🚜 Refactor

- Added unit tests for various components and refactor test organization
- Simplify color handling by removing theme loading and related code

### ⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

- Bump deps and switch to DefaultTerminal for ratatui

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [v0.6.3] - 2026-02-20

### 🚀 Features

- *(tui)* Added mouse and keyboard controls for the quick connect menu and made enhancements to the user interactions
- *(tui)* Added text editing when using the terminal search or the host search

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- *(tui)* Added handling for paste events so that when a user paste text its sent as one big chunk
- *(tui)* Fixed past when in a TUI app within a tab session so that it will paste the whole chunk.

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

- *(tui)* Tree folders will now be sorted alphabetical

## [v0.5.9] - 2026-02-12

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- *(watcher)* Fixed a bug were the config hot reload would not always work if the file was a full rewrite (Ex. Nano or Fresh saves).
- *(watcher)* Made another change to the config watcher as it was still not detecting atomic writes. It will not watch the config directory and pick up the file change when set as a temp.

### 📚 Documentation

- *(Template)* Change network template formatting for *
- Updated example image
- Wrong image try again
- *(template)* Add new highlight matches to network template.

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [v0.5.8] - 2026-02-11

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- *(highlighter)* Fixed and issues with the byte offset that was causing raw chunk and clean chunk to be miss aligned and therefore not match the full word when ANSI characters were in the chunk.

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [v0.5.1] - 2026-01-27

## [v0.5.0] - 2026-01-27

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Debug formating issue

### 💼 Other

- V0.5 (#28)

* feat: Hot config reloading well csh is running
feat: debug logging
feat: SSH session logging
feat: SSH logging secret redaction
feat: Launch title
revert: Removed vault features and discontinued work on this
revert: removed TUI features
refactor: cleaned up code layout
chore: Updated dependencies
chore: Updated release workflow
doc: Updated default and network config templates

* revert: Allow bot to update instead

* chore: Update cargo dist

* chore: updated github acction versions

* chore: fix dist github action

* feat: Added zsh and fish auto completion configs

* doc: Added documentation for shell completions extensions

* refactor(logging): enhance observability with comprehensive logging and documentation

- Add log_info, log_warn, log_error methods and macros
- Replace unwrap/expect with proper error propagation throughout codebase
- Add extensive logging for config, process, and SSH lifecycle events
- Implement comprehensive documentation for all modules and functions
- Add named threads and improve log formatting with consistent timestamps
- Fix logging initialization to capture initial config load

* chore: cleanup of emojis

* refactor: improve code quality, error handling, and performance

- Remove duplicate logging initialization in main.rs
- Replace .expect() with proper error handling in config loader
- Add validation for hex color codes and regex compilation
- Optimize ANSI regex compilation using lazy static in SSH logger
- Improve path handling to support non-UTF8 paths in config watcher
- Add defensive logging for index mapping fallback cases in highlighter
- Optimize String capacity allocation for ANSI sequences in highlighter
- Improve hostname extraction using idiomatic .last() method
- Add PID to process error messages for better debugging
- Fix CLI arg flag: change SSH logging from -L to -l for consistency

BREAKING CHANGE: SSH logging flag changed from -L to -l

* feat(config): add profile support

* fix(logging): detect ssh hostname from arguments regardless of position

doc(shell-completion): add sshpass usage information

* doc(main.rs): Fixed code comments for hostname extraction

* fix(highlighter.rs): Fixed index mapping boundary bug in highlighter

* fix(log/ssh.rs): Logic error in SSH logger character filter

* fix(lmacros): fixed logger instance being created on every macro call

* fix(highlighter): rremoved unused variable 'filtered_matches'

* fix(process): Fixed rules being cloned on every chunk

* fix(log/ssh.rs): Fixed issue with ssh log file being repeatedly opened

* refactor: improved logging and code quality

* refactor: improve config access safety and secret redaction performance

* feat: Added support for windows,  macOS (beta), and linux.

* doc(README): Updated main readme to match everything that is new with v0.5

* fix: Fixed all cargo clippy errors

* doc(arg): Adjusted help page command examples

### 📚 Documentation

- Updated network config template
- Updated network template config file and defualt config template

- Release v0.5.0 (#29)
